name: @bitcoinerlab/descriptors-core
description: This library parses and creates Bitcoin Miniscript Descriptors and generates Partially Signed Bitcoin Transactions (PSBTs). It provides PSBT finalizers and signers for single-signature, BIP32 and Hardware Wallets, with explicit backend wiring for advanced use cases.
author: Jose-Luis Landabaso

scripts.build:fixtures: node test/tools/generateBitcoinCoreFixtures.js -i test/fixtures/descriptor_tests.cpp | npx prettier --parser typescript > test/fixtures/bitcoinCore.ts
scripts.build: npm run build:src && npm run build:test
scripts.test:integration:soft:
npm run ensureTester && node test/integration/standardOutputs.js && echo "

" && node test/integration/miniscript.js && echo "

" && node test/integration/sortedmulti.js && echo "

" && node test/integration/taproot.js && echo "

" && node test/integration/scure.js
scripts.test:integration:ledger:
npm run ensureTester && node test/integration/ledgerTaproot.js && echo "

" && node test/integration/ledger.js
scripts.test:integration:ledger:scure: cross-env BITCOIN_LIB=scure bash -c 'npm run ensureTester && node test/integration/ledgerTaproot.js && echo "" && echo "" && node test/integration/ledger.js'
scripts.test:matrix: npm run test:unit && npm run test:unit:scure && npm run test:scure-adapter && npm run test:integration:soft && npm run test:integration:soft:scure
scripts.test: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test:matrix
scripts.test:ledger:
npm run lint && npm run build && echo "

" && npm run test:integration:ledger:scure && echo "

" && npm run test:integration:ledger
scripts.publish:all: npm run publish:check && npm publish --access public && (cd ./packages/descriptors && npm publish --access public) && (cd ./packages/descriptors-scure && npm publish --access public)
scripts.prepublishOnly:
npm run test && echo "

" && npm run test:integration:ledger:scure && echo "

" && npm run test:integration:ledger
